examples.title: Basic code block
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { CodeBlock } from '@lostgradient/cinder/code-block';
  const code = `function greet(name: string): string {
  return \`Hello, \${name}!\`;
}

const message = greet('world');`;
</script>

<CodeBlock {code} />

examples.title: Delayed highlighting
examples.description: Colorization can resolve after first paint while the code block keeps its dimensions.

examples.title: With language label and copy
examples.description: Header shows the language and a copy-to-clipboard button. Setting a language is all it takes — CodeBlock lazy-loads the bundled Shiki highlighter on the client and highlights automatically, no extra wiring.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { CodeBlock } from '@lostgradient/cinder';

  const code = `SELECT id, name, created_at
FROM users
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;`;
</script>

<CodeBlock {code} language="sql" copyable />
